name: law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed reminders cause cash flow gaps. We automate overdue invoice reminders instead of manual tracking and reminders.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed reminders cause cash flow gaps. We automate overdue invoice reminders instead of manual tracking and reminders.
